description: Cross-language conformance for the engine resolution QUERY contract. Each case is a JSON ResolveRequest fed through resolve_json; the response must be a streams decision whose ranked entries match the pinned (raw_index, score) order. Because ranking is fixed-point i64, the exact scores are byte-reproducible across the Swift/Kotlin/TS bridges that call this. Scores follow the ranking weight contract (tier 2160=60000/1080=45000/720=30000 x1000, cached +8000 x1000, webdl +90 x1000, hdtv +40 x1000).
